summary: End-to-end testing of Football 5v5 Stats Platform. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests pass covering auth (cookie + Bearer 401/200), Players CRUD with duplicate-409 and delete-blocked-409 when matches exist, Matches CRUD with even-team/no-overlap validation, Stats global+players+player-detail with elo_history/best_teammates/tough_opponents, Team Generator with odd-count rejection and 3 strategies (best/competitive/random_fair) with balance_pct and predicted_win_prob_a, and ELO replay correctness (winners >1500, losers <1500 after a single match). Frontend: Login renders google-login-btn; injecting session_token cookie (tok_smoke_test) loads Dashboard with global stats cards (Matches Joués, Buts Marqués, Joueurs Actifs), three ranking widgets (Win%, ELO, Goal Diff) and recent matches list. Players page lists players with sort/filter; add+edit+toggle work; delete triggers Supprimer confirm dialog and DELETE API succeeds. Match form (/matches/new) supports +/- score, add-A/add-B player selection, submits via submit-match-btn and redirects to /matches. Generator at /generator (NOT /team-generator) returns 3 option cards (Meilleur équilibre / Plus compétitif / Aléatoire équitable) with BALANCE%, ΔELO, ΔWin%, ΔGD, P(A win). Player profile shows ELO/Matches/Win%/Streak summary cells and a Recharts line chart, best teammates and tough opponents. Logout calls /api/auth/logout and redirects to /login.

issues: Route mismatch surface: navigation/header link is /generator but the original problem statement referenced 'Team Generator' page implicitly. App.js binds 'generator' path which works; no fix needed but flagging for awareness in case any deep-link expected /team-generator.

critical_code_review_comments: stats.py teammate aggregation (lines 156-159) uses `elif score_a == score_b` inside the team_b branch — functionally equivalent but mirror clause would be clearer for maintenance.

server.py /auth/session stores expires_at as ISO string while /auth/me parses both string and datetime — consistent, but mixing types in MongoDB makes future queries (e.g., $lt expiry sweep) harder. Consider standardizing on BSON Date.

server.py CORS uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; works currently only because session_token cookie is set by backend and same-site None+secure. Tighten allow_origins to frontend domain in prod.
Frontend Players uses window.confirm — acceptable but limits styling/i18n consistency with the dark theme. Consider shadcn AlertDialog (already in components/ui).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, players CRUD, match form submit, generator 3-options, player profile + Recharts, logout)

test_credentials: Bearer token: tok_smoke_test (user_id=user_test_smoke, email=smoke@test.com). Pre-seeded in MongoDB test_database. Session was re-extended to 2026-12-31 after logout test invalidated it.
seed_data_creation: Pre-existing 4 players (Alice, Bob, Carlos, Diana) and 1 match (4-2) retained. Test players (TEST_*) and test matches created during runs were cleaned up at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use Bearer tok_smoke_test against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. For UI cookie injection, domain=elo-kickoff.preview.emergentagent.com, name=session_token, secure+sameSite=None. Important: Generator route is /generator (not /team-generator). Match submit button testid is submit-match-btn. Player delete uses window.confirm — register page.on('dialog', accept) BEFORE clicking. Logout invalidates the session in DB; re-seed with mongosh if you need to reuse it. Backend test suite: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py.
rca of the issue: None — all features under test pass.
